query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a person with dark hair wearing a short-sleeved crew-neck shirt, positioned beside a reflective dark surface that creates a mirrored duplicate of their face and upper body. The subject gazes upward and to the left with a contemplative expression. A textured light-colored wall occupies the left portion of the frame, and a dark rectangular shape appears in the lower left corner. Visible film grain texture is present throughout the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A faded, grainy black-and-white photograph showing a person with dark hair wearing a short-sleeved crew-neck shirt, positioned beside a reflective dark surface that creates a ghostly double exposure of their face and upper body. The subject gazes upward with a pensive, melancholic expression. The muted, desaturated tones and heavy analog grain contribute to an exhausted, nostalgic atmosphere, while the layered double exposure produces a dreamlike, emotionally distressed quality. A textured wall and dark shape appear in the left portion of the frame, adding to the composition's raw, lo-fi aesthetic.
